100%

Materials

Fashion waste isn't just ugly.
It's damaging the planet.

The fashion industry is one of the world's biggest polluters. Every year, millions of tons of plastic, metal, fabric scraps, and glass are discarded — ending up in landfills. Our jewellery turns that waste into something beautiful.

The Campaign Concept

The same material.
Two completely different lives.

Our "Wear the Change" campaign shows real transformations — not polished stock photos. Because the proof is in the piece.

🗑️

Before — Waste

Safety pins headed for landfill. Soda can tabs crushed and discarded. Bottle caps piling up after every drink. Glass beads and fabric scraps thrown away after production. Materials the world wrote off as useless trash.

💍

After — Jewellery

The same materials, reimagined. Safety pins become statement necklaces. Can tabs transform into colourful earrings. Bottle caps turn into one-of-a-kind art. Each piece carries a story — of creativity, sustainability, and choosing fashion that cares for the planet.

Wear waste.
Make it beautiful.

Post-Launch Campaign Structure

Three phases.
One sustained story.

Each phase builds on the last — creating a full funnel from awareness to purchase.

01
Instagram Reels + Stories

Green Content Series

  • Weekly Reels: waste → jewellery transformation
  • Behind-the-scenes handcrafting process
  • Fashion styling posts showing final product
  • Instagram Stories: polls, Q&A, eco-facts
  • ₹500 voucher for best UGC video submitted
Organic reach + community building
02
Instagram + WhatsApp

Micro-Influencer Collab

  • Partner with 3–5 eco-fashion micro-influencers
  • Send free jewellery + sustainability story brief
  • Unboxing + "This was waste" Reels format
  • All posts tagged #WearTheChange + #Ad
  • Drive traffic to WhatsApp catalogue & DMs
Trust-building through authentic voices
03
Meta Ads + WhatsApp Broadcast

AI Retargeting & Social Proof

  • Retarget page visitors with UGC video ads
  • Meta Advantage+ AI to optimize ad delivery
  • WhatsApp: "See what others made from waste"
  • Seasonal angle: "Gift the Change this festive season"
  • Google review prompts to all post-purchase buyers
Conversion and loyalty loop
Green Content → Influencer Reach → AI Retargeting closes the funnel
Emerging Technology Integration

Show the right piece
to the right person.

Our campaign uses AI-powered personalization to reach exactly the right eco-conscious buyers — at the right moment.

1

Scroll Instagram or click an ad

Meta Advantage+ AI detects users who follow eco-fashion, sustainable living, and handmade jewellery pages — and shows them our campaign Reel automatically.

2

Watch the transformation

A 30-second Reel shows the full journey — waste material collected, jewellery handcrafted, final piece worn. Real hands. Real story. No stock footage.

3

Personalized product suggestions

Based on engagement — earrings Reels vs necklace posts — the AI retargets users with the specific product category they showed interest in.

4

One tap to WhatsApp or shop

Every ad links directly to our WhatsApp catalogue or Instagram Shop. Choose your piece, customise colour or style, and order in minutes.

5

Share your piece, join the movement

Post-purchase, buyers are invited to share with #WearTheChange. The best posts are featured on our page — turning buyers into brand ambassadors.

📱 AI Personalization Technology

Powered by Meta Advantage+ & Instagram's Algorithm

Meta Advantage+ and Google PMax now use AI to automatically optimize ad creatives, targeting, and delivery — at zero extra cost beyond the ad budget.

This means our jewellery reaches exactly the right eco-conscious consumers, without expensive manual targeting setup.

Future upgrade: AR try-on filter on Instagram — let users virtually wear our jewellery before buying. Planned for Year 2.


Zero Extra Tech Cost · Free Platform Tools
Our Pledge

We market responsibly.
No exceptions.

No Greenwashing

Every eco-claim we make is backed by actual production practice. Our jewellery IS made from recycled waste — we never exaggerate or use vague sustainability terms without proof.

Full Influencer Transparency

All sponsored content is tagged #Ad or #Gifted. We brief every collaborator on ASCI disclosure guidelines before they post. No exceptions.

Honest Pricing Always

We don't use fake discounts or overstate affordability. Our pricing (₹150–₹900) is clearly communicated as value-for-craft. No manipulation.

Data Privacy (DPDP Act 2023)

Our WhatsApp broadcast uses only opt-in contacts. AI personalization runs through Meta's standard platform tools only — no unauthorized data collection, ever.

Responsible Marketing = Long-term Brand Trust · ASCI Compliance · DPDP Act 2023
